message:
chore(beads): mark franken_numpy-hswd (scalar math + windows port) in_progress

Flushes the current beads state: franken_numpy-hswd
"[PORT] Rust-port fnp-python scalar math, windows, and polynomial
helpers" transitions from `open` to `in_progress` (assignee
`ubuntu`) reflecting the rust-port work already landed for bartlett
(e7a2aa4), hanning/hamming/blackman (75b13a8), and kaiser (d208811).

The hswd scope also covers real_if_close, angle, heaviside,
rad2deg, deg2rad, positive, negative, reciprocal, conjugate, fmod,
iscomplex/isreal, square, cbrt, expm1, log1p, fabs, floor_divide,
real, imag, unwrap, the polyder/polyint/polyadd/polysub/polymul
polynomial family, poly, roots, polyfit, polyval, i0, vander, and
fix -- so the issue stays open in_progress until the rest of that
scalar-math / polynomial / window surface is ported over. All other
hsw* family issues remain open at their existing priorities.

Pure `br sync --flush-only` output -- no hand-editing of the JSONL.
